scope: Cycle 26: Bug hunt C25 (HubAntre dashboard + runes counter) + BiomeRadial hover info panel

bugs_found.description: Dashboard reads meta.factions (nonexistent in meta) instead of meta.faction_rep. All 5 ProgressBars show default value 20 on Hub load, regardless of actual cross-run reputation. Signal-driven updates work during session but initial values are wrong.
Runes counter reads meta.oghams_discovered (nonexistent key) instead of state.oghams.skills_unlocked. Counter always shows 0/18 regardless of actual oghams unlocked.

overall_assessment: Bug hunt C25 found 2 state key mismatches introduced in C25 dashboard code. Both fixed with 2-line changes. BiomeRadial hover panel adds 137 lines of UI drawing code. 34 total bugs fixed across 26 cycles.
